description_long: This is a fixed-blade combat or utility knife featuring a long, single-edged, matte black blade with a straight spine and a slight clip point. The blade has a fuller (groove) running along its length, which reduces weight and adds strength. The handle is cylindrical, constructed from stacked leather rings, giving it a textured, grippy surface, and ends in a rounded metal pommel. A simple, flat crossguard separates the blade from the handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements. The knife is reminiscent of classic military or survival knives, suitable for heavy-duty tasks.
description: A robust, matte black fixed-blade knife with a grooved blade and a stacked leather handle, separated by a flat crossguard. The design is utilitarian and lacks ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black blade, fuller groove, flat crossguard, and stacked leather handle.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the pointed tip of the blade and the circular end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded pommel and the alignment of the blade's spine.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, clip point, fuller groove
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, stacked leather rings, rounded metal pommel, textured grip
